title: Ye Rasathi Rosapoo Lyrics En Uyir Thozhan

va va va

kangal imai moodum podhum

thoora irundhum

aagaayam poo pandhal
angae pon oonjal

minnum velli meengalai
maeni engum sooduven
medai ennum dheviyai

angam engum thangam
hey engum inbam pongum

mangala vaathiyam mandhiram
mulanga manjal kayiru
manikaluthil aeridum
annaal ...

vaanveliyil poo virithu

Vaanum indha boomiyum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ye Rasathi Rosapoo'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, celebrating love in a poetic manner.

In which movie is 'Ye Rasathi Rosapoo' featured?

'Ye Rasathi Rosapoo' is featured in the movie En Uyir Thozhan.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Malaysia Vasudevan.

Who wrote the lyrics for 'Ye Rasathi Rosapoo'?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Gangai Amaran.

When was 'Ye Rasathi Rosapoo' released?

The song was released on February 16, 1990.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie En Uyir Thozhan, the song Ye Rasathi Rosapoo serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of romance, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. With its soothing melody, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced the joys and pains of love. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ye Rasathi Rosapoo from the enchanting En Uyir Thozhan is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the heartfelt lyrics penned by Gangai Amaran and the soulful rendition by Malaysia Vasudevan, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of nostalgia as you immerse yourself in this classic tune that beautifully encapsulates romantic emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Oh beloved, come, come, come, my dear, like a beautiful flower, come, come, come.
Oh divine one, oh goddess, oh beautiful one, you are the one who adorns the garland with good qualities.
Oh beloved, come, come, come, my dear, like a beautiful flower, come, come, come.
When the eyes close, your love and my love will meet, and we will sleep as one in our hearts.
Whether far away or close by, we will be together, whether alone or together, we will be here now.
The flowers bloom in the sky, will you swing there? When the time comes, I will be there too.
I will spread the shining silver fish everywhere, I will declare that the goddess is mine.
Everywhere there is gold, everywhere there is joy flowing.
Oh beloved, come, come, come, my dear, like a beautiful flower, come, come, come.
Oh divine one, oh goddess, oh beautiful one, you are the one who adorns the garland with good qualities.
Oh beloved, come, come, come, my dear, like a beautiful flower, come, come, come.
After the celebration, we will gather together and count the days.
The stone is crushed, and looking at it, the beautiful flower will wear the garland, and the auspicious sound will come from the yellow thread.
In the sky, flowers will bloom, and we will see them, the first night will blend with the sweet music.
The sky and this earth, I have given them, with the flower of love in my hand.
Oh dear, beloved woman, in front of the temple of desire.
Oh beloved, come, come, come, my dear, like a beautiful flower, come, come, come.
Oh divine one, oh goddess, oh beautiful one, you are the one who adorns the garland with good qualities.
Oh beloved, come, come, come, my dear, like a beautiful flower, come, come, come.
